verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ الٓر ۚ كِتَٰبٌ أُحْكِمَتْ ءَايَٰتُهُۥ ثُمَّ فُصِّلَتْ مِن لَّدُنْ حَكِيمٍ خَبِيرٍ
verses.text: Alif Lām Rā’. A Book – its verses have been clearly composed (and) then made distinct – (sent down) from One (who is) wise, aware.

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَّا تَعْبُدُوٓا۟ إِلَّا ٱللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّنِى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌۭ وَبَشِيرٌۭ
verses.text: ‘Do not serve (anyone) but God! Surely I am a warner and bringer of good news to you from Him.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَنِ ٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ ثُمَّ تُوبُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِ يُمَتِّعْكُم مَّتَٰعًا حَسَنًا إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍۢ مُّسَمًّۭى وَيُؤْتِ كُلَّ ذِى فَضْلٍۢ فَضْلَهُۥ ۖ وَإِن تَوَلَّوْا۟ فَإِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍۢ كَبِيرٍ
verses.text: And: ‘Ask forgiveness from your Lord, then turn to Him (in repentance). He will give you good enjoyment (of life) for an appointed time, and give His favor to everyone (deserving) of favor. If you turn away – surely I fear for you the punishment of a great Day.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَأَنِ ٱسۡتَغۡفِرُواْ رَبَّكُمُۥ ثُمَّ تُوبُواْ إِلَيۡهِۦ يُمَتِّعۡكُمُۥ مَتَٰعًا حَسَنًا إِلَىٰ أَجَلٖ مُّسَمّٗى وَيُؤۡتِ كُلَّ ذِي فَضۡلٖ فَضۡلَهُۥۖ وَإِن تَّوَلَّوۡاْ فَإِنِّيَ أَخَافُ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٖ كَبِيرٍ
canonical_variants.english: So askpl your Lord for forgiveness then repent to Him, that He may grant you good enjoyment for a stated term and bestow His grace upon every graceful one. But if youpl turn away, then I fear for you the punishment of a supreme day.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَأَنِ ٱسۡتَغۡفِرُواْ رَبَّكُمُۥ ثُمَّ تُوبُواْ إِلَيۡهِۦ يُمَتِّعۡكُمُۥ مَتَٰعًا حَسَنًا إِلَىٰ أَجَلٖ مُّسَمّٗى وَيُؤۡتِ كُلَّ ذِي فَضۡلٖ فَضۡلَهُۥۖ وَإِن تَوَلَّوۡاْ فَإِنِّيَ أَخَافُ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٖ كَبِيرٍ
canonical_variants.english: So askpl your Lord for forgiveness then repent to Him, that He may grant you good enjoyment for a stated term and bestow His grace upon every graceful one. But if they turn away, then I fear for you the punishment of a supreme day.

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَى ٱللَّهِ مَرْجِعُكُمْ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌ
verses.text: To God is your return. He is powerful over everything.’

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَآ إِنَّهُمْ يَثْنُونَ صُدُورَهُمْ لِيَسْتَخْفُوا۟ مِنْهُ ۚ أَلَا حِينَ يَسْتَغْشُونَ ثِيَابَهُمْ يَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.text: Is it not a fact that they cover their hearts to hide from Him? Is it not (a fact) that (even) when they cover themselves with their clothing, He knows what they keep secret and what they speak aloud? Surely He knows what is in the hearts.

competing_variants.variant_arabic: أَلاَ إِنَّهُمْ تَثْنَوْنِي صُدُورُهُمْ لِيَسْتَخْفُوا مِنْهُ ۚ أَلَا حِينَ يَسْتَغْشُونَ ثِيَابَهُمْ يَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ ۚ إِنَّهُ عَلِيمٌ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُورِ
competing_variants.variant_english: No doubt! They fold up their breasts to hide themselves from Him. Unquestionably, [even] when they cover themselves in their clothing, He knows what they conceal and what they declare. Indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts.
competing_variants.hadith_arabic: حَدَّثَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ صَبَّاحٍ، حَدَّثَنَا حَجَّاجٌ، قَالَ قَالَ ابْنُ جُرَيْجٍ أَخْبَرَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبَّادِ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ، أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ ابْنَ عَبَّاسٍ، يَقْرَأُ ‏{‏أَلاَ إِنَّهُمْ تَثْنَوْنِي صُدُورُهُمْ‏}‏ قَالَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْهَا فَقَالَ أُنَاسٌ كَانُوا يَسْتَحْيُونَ أَنْ يَتَخَلَّوْا فَيُفْضُوا إِلَى السَّمَاءِ، وَأَنْ يُجَامِعُوا نِسَاءَهُمْ فَيُفْضُوا إِلَى السَّمَاءِ، فَنَزَلَ ذَلِكَ فِيهِمْ‏.‏
competing_variants.hadith_english: Narrated Muhammad bin `Abbas bin Ja`far:That he heard Ibn `Abbas reciting: "No doubt! They fold up their breasts." (11.5) and asked him about its explanation. He said, "Some people used to hide themselves while answering the call of nature in an open space lest they be exposed to the sky, and also when they had sexual relation with their wives in an open space lest they be exposed to the sky, so the above revelation was sent down regarding them

competing_variants.variant_arabic: أَلَا إِنَّهُمْ تَثْنَوْنِي صُدُورُهُمْ لِيَسْتَخْفُوا مِنْهُ ۚ أَلَا حِينَ يَسْتَغْشُونَ ثِيَابَهُمْ يَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ ۚ إِنَّهُ عَلِيمٌ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُورِ
competing_variants.variant_english: No doubt! Their breasts fold up (bend) to hide from Him. Unquestionably, [even] when they cover themselves in their garments, He knows what they conceal and what they declare. Indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts.
competing_variants.hadith_arabic: حَدَّثَنِي إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ مُوسَى، أَخْبَرَنَا هِشَامٌ، عَنِ ابْنِ جُرَيْجٍ، وَأَخْبَرَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبَّادِ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ، أَنَّ ابْنَ عَبَّاسٍ، قَرَأَ ‏{‏أَلاَ إِنَّهُمْ تَثْنَوْنِي صُدُورُهُمْ‏}‏ قُلْتُ يَا أَبَا الْعَبَّاسِ مَا تَثْنَوْنِي صُدُورُهُمْ قَالَ كَانَ الرَّجُلُ يُجَامِعُ امْرَأَتَهُ فَيَسْتَحِي أَوْ يَتَخَلَّى فَيَسْتَحِي فَنَزَلَتْ ‏{‏أَلاَ إِنَّهُمْ يَثْنُونَ صُدُورَهُمْ‏}‏
competing_variants.hadith_english: Narrated Muhammad bin `Abbas bin Ja`far:Ibn `Abbas recited. "No doubt! They fold up their breasts." I said, "O Abu `Abbas! What is meant by "They fold up their breasts?" He said, "A man used to feel shy on having sexual relation with his wife or on answering the call of nature (in an open space) so this Verse was revealed:-- "No doubt! They fold up their breasts

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَمَا مِن دَآبَّةٍۢ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا عَلَى ٱللَّهِ رِزْقُهَا وَيَعْلَمُ مُسْتَقَرَّهَا وَمُسْتَوْدَعَهَا ۚ كُلٌّۭ فِى كِتَٰبٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
verses.text: (There is) not a creature on the earth but its provision (depends) on God. He knows its dwelling place and its storage place. Everything is (recorded) in a clear Book.

verses.quran_arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍۢ وَكَانَ عَرْشُهُۥ عَلَى ٱلْمَآءِ لِيَبْلُوَكُمْ أَيُّكُمْ أَحْسَنُ عَمَلًۭا ۗ وَلَئِن قُلْتَ إِنَّكُم مَّبْعُوثُونَ مِنۢ بَعْدِ ٱلْمَوْتِ لَيَقُولَنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ إِنْ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحْرٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.text: He (it is) who created the heavens and the earth in six days – and His throne was upon the water – that He might test you (to see) which of you is best in deed. If indeed you say, ‘Surely you will be raised up after death,’ those who disbelieve will indeed say, ‘This is nothing but clear magic.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَئِنْ أَخَّرْنَا عَنْهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابَ إِلَىٰٓ أُمَّةٍۢ مَّعْدُودَةٍۢ لَّيَقُولُنَّ مَا يَحْبِسُهُۥٓ ۗ أَلَا يَوْمَ يَأْتِيهِمْ لَيْسَ مَصْرُوفًا عَنْهُمْ وَحَاقَ بِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
verses.text: If indeed We postpone the punishment from them until a set period (of time), they will indeed say, ‘What is holding it back?’ Is it not (a fact) that on the Day when it comes to them, it will not be diverted from them, and what they were mocking will overwhelm them?

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَئِنْ أَذَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ مِنَّا رَحْمَةًۭ ثُمَّ نَزَعْنَٰهَا مِنْهُ إِنَّهُۥ لَيَـُٔوسٌۭ كَفُورٌۭ
verses.text: If indeed We give a person a taste of mercy from Us, (and) then We withdraw it from him, surely he is indeed despairing (and) ungrateful.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَئِنْ أَذَقْنَٰهُ نَعْمَآءَ بَعْدَ ضَرَّآءَ مَسَّتْهُ لَيَقُولَنَّ ذَهَبَ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتُ عَنِّىٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ لَفَرِحٌۭ فَخُورٌ
verses.text: But if indeed We give him a taste of blessing, after hardship has touched him, he will indeed say, ‘The evils have gone from me.’ Surely he is indeed gloating (and) boastful

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ صَبَرُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ لَهُم مَّغْفِرَةٌۭ وَأَجْرٌۭ كَبِيرٌۭ
verses.text: – except those who are patient and do righteous deeds. Those – for them (there is) forgiveness and a great reward.

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَعَلَّكَ تَارِكٌۢ بَعْضَ مَا يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَيْكَ وَضَآئِقٌۢ بِهِۦ صَدْرُكَ أَن يَقُولُوا۟ لَوْلَآ أُنزِلَ عَلَيْهِ كَنزٌ أَوْ جَآءَ مَعَهُۥ مَلَكٌ ۚ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ نَذِيرٌۭ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ وَكِيلٌ
verses.text: Perhaps you are leaving out part of what you are inspired (with), and your heart is weighed down by it, because they say, ‘If only a treasure were sent down on him or an angel came with him.’ You are only a warner. God is guardian over everything.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ ٱفْتَرَىٰهُ ۖ قُلْ فَأْتُوا۟ بِعَشْرِ سُوَرٍۢ مِّثْلِهِۦ مُفْتَرَيَٰتٍۢ وَٱدْعُوا۟ مَنِ ٱسْتَطَعْتُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Or do they say, ‘He has forged it’? Say: ‘Then bring ten sūras forged like it, and call on whomever you can, other than God, if you are truthful.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِلَّمْ يَسْتَجِيبُوا۟ لَكُمْ فَٱعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّمَآ أُنزِلَ بِعِلْمِ ٱللَّهِ وَأَن لَّآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ فَهَلْ أَنتُم مُّسْلِمُونَ
verses.text: If they do not respond to you, know that it has been sent down with the knowledge of God, and that (there is) no god but Him. So (will) you submit?

verses.quran_arabic: مَن كَانَ يُرِيدُ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَزِينَتَهَا نُوَفِّ إِلَيْهِمْ أَعْمَٰلَهُمْ فِيهَا وَهُمْ فِيهَا لَا يُبْخَسُونَ
verses.text: Whoever desires this present life and its (passing) splendor – We shall pay them in full for their deeds in it, and they will not be shortchanged in it.

verses.quran_arabic: أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَيْسَ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ إِلَّا ٱلنَّارُ ۖ وَحَبِطَ مَا صَنَعُوا۟ فِيهَا وَبَٰطِلٌۭ مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Those are the ones who – for them there is nothing in the Hereafter but the Fire. What they have done will come to nothing there. What they have done will be in vain.

verses.quran_arabic: أَفَمَن كَانَ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٍۢ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦ وَيَتْلُوهُ شَاهِدٌۭ مِّنْهُ وَمِن قَبْلِهِۦ كِتَٰبُ مُوسَىٰٓ إِمَامًۭا وَرَحْمَةً ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ ۚ وَمَن يَكْفُرْ بِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلْأَحْزَابِ فَٱلنَّارُ مَوْعِدُهُۥ ۚ فَلَا تَكُ فِى مِرْيَةٍۢ مِّنْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُ ٱلْحَقُّ مِن رَّبِّكَ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Is the one who (stands) on a clear sign from his Lord, and recites it as a witness from Him, and before it was the Book of Moses as a model and mercy [. . .]? Those believe in it, but whoever disbelieves in it from the factions – the Fire is his appointed place. So do not be in doubt about it. Surely it is the truth from your Lord, but most of the people do not believe.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ يُعْرَضُونَ عَلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ وَيَقُولُ ٱلْأَشْهَٰدُ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَبُوا۟ عَلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ ۚ أَلَا لَعْنَةُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَى ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: Who is more evil than the one who forges a lie against God? Those will be presented before their Lord, and the witnesses will say, ‘These are those who lied against their Lord.’ Is it not (a fact) that the curse of God is on the evildoers,

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَصُدُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَيَبْغُونَهَا عِوَجًۭا وَهُم بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمْ كَٰفِرُونَ
verses.text: who keep (people) from the way of God and desire (to make) it crooked, and they are disbelievers in the Hereafter?

verses.quran_arabic: أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ لَمْ يَكُونُوا۟ مُعْجِزِينَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا كَانَ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مِنْ أَوْلِيَآءَ ۘ يُضَٰعَفُ لَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ ۚ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَسْتَطِيعُونَ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ يُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: Those – they cannot escape (Him) on the earth, and they have no allies other than God. The punishment will be doubled for them. They could not hear and did not see.

verses.quran_arabic: أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ وَضَلَّ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَفْتَرُونَ
verses.text: Those are the ones who have lost their (own) selves, and what they forged has abandoned them.

verses.quran_arabic: لَا جَرَمَ أَنَّهُمْ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمُ ٱلْأَخْسَرُونَ
verses.text: (There is) no doubt that they will be the worst losers in the Hereafter.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَأَخْبَتُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ ۖ هُمْ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ
verses.text: Surely those who believe, and do righteous deeds, and humble themselves to their Lord – those are the companions of the Garden. There they will remain.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ مَثَلُ ٱلْفَرِيقَيْنِ كَٱلْأَعْمَىٰ وَٱلْأَصَمِّ وَٱلْبَصِيرِ وَٱلسَّمِيعِ ۚ هَلْ يَسْتَوِيَانِ مَثَلًا ۚ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: The parable of the two groups is like the blind and the deaf, and the sighted and the hearing. Are they equal in comparison? Will you not take heed?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ مَثَلُ اُ۬لۡفَرِيقَيۡنِ كَاَلۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَاَلۡأَصَمِّ وَاَلۡبَصِيرِ وَاَلسَّمِيعِۚ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِيَانِ مَثَلًاۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: The parable of the two groups is that of one who is blind and deaf, and one who is seeing and hearing. Are they equal in similitude? Will you not constantly remember?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ مَثَلُ اُ۬لۡفَرِيقَيۡنِ كَاَلۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَاَلۡأَصَمِّ  وَاَلۡبَصِيرِ وَاَلسَّمِيعِۚ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِيَانِ مَثَلًاۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: The parable of the two groups is that of one who is blind and deaf, and one who is seeing and hearing. Are they equal in similitude? Will you not constantly remember?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ مَثَلُ ٱلۡفَرِيقَيۡنِ كَٱلۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَٱلۡأَصَمِّ وَٱلۡبَصِيرِ وَٱلسَّمِيعِۚ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِيَانِ مَثَلًاۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: The parable of the two groups is that of one who is blind and deaf, and one who is seeing and hearing. Are they equal in similitude? Will you not constantly remember?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ مَثَلُ ٱلۡفَرِيقَيۡنِ كَٱلۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَٱلۡأَصَمِّ وَٱلۡبَصِيرِ وَٱلسَّمِيعِۚ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِيَانِ مَثَلًاۚ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: The parable of the two groups is that of one who is blind and deaf, and one who is seeing and hearing. Are they equal in similitude? Will you not remind yourselves?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ مَثَلُ ٱلۡفَرِيقَيۡنِ كَٱلۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَٱلۡأَصَمِّ وَٱلۡبَصِيرِ وَٱلسَّمِيعِۚ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِيَانِ مَثَلًاۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: The parable of the two groups is that of one who is blind and deaf, and one who is seeing and hearing. Are they equal in similitude? Will you not constantly remember?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ مَثَلُ ٱلۡفَرِيقَيۡنِ كَٱلۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَٱلۡأَصَمِّ وَٱلۡبَصِيرِ وَٱلسَّمِيعِۚ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِيَانِ مَثَلًاۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: The parable of the two groups is that of one who is blind and deaf, and one who is seeing and hearing. Are they equal in similitude? Will you not constantly remember?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ مَثَلُ اُ۬لْفَرِيقَيْنِ كَالْأَعْمَىٰ وَالْأَصَمِّ وَالْبَصِيرِ وَالسَّمِيعِۖ هَلْ يَسْتَوِيَٰنِ مَثَلاًۖ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: The parable of the two groups is that of one who is blind and deaf, and one who is seeing and hearing. Are they equal in similitude? Will you not constantly remember?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ مَثَلُ اُ۬لْفَرِيقَيْنِ كَالَاعْم۪ىٰ وَالَاصَمِّ وَالْبَصِيرِ وَالسَّمِيعِۖ هَلْ يَسْتَوِيَٰنِ مَثَلاًۖ اَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: The parable of the two groups is that of one who is blind and deaf, and one who is seeing and hearing. Are they equal in similitude? Will you not constantly remember?

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦٓ إِنِّى لَكُمْ نَذِيرٌۭ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: Certainly We sent Noah to his people: ‘I am a clear warner for you.

verses.quran_arabic: أَن لَّا تَعْبُدُوٓا۟ إِلَّا ٱللَّهَ ۖ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ أَلِيمٍۢ
verses.text: Do not serve (anyone) but God! Surely I fear for you the punishment of a painful Day.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَقَالَ ٱلْمَلَأُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن قَوْمِهِۦ مَا نَرَىٰكَ إِلَّا بَشَرًۭا مِّثْلَنَا وَمَا نَرَىٰكَ ٱتَّبَعَكَ إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ أَرَاذِلُنَا بَادِىَ ٱلرَّأْىِ وَمَا نَرَىٰ لَكُمْ عَلَيْنَا مِن فَضْلٍۭ بَلْ نَظُنُّكُمْ كَٰذِبِينَ
verses.text: The assembly of those who disbelieved of his people said, ‘We do not see you as (anything) but a human being like us, and we do not see following you (any) but the worst (and) most gullible of us. We do not see in you any superiority over us. No! We think you are liars.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ يَٰقَوْمِ أَرَءَيْتُمْ إِن كُنتُ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٍۢ مِّن رَّبِّى وَءَاتَىٰنِى رَحْمَةًۭ مِّنْ عِندِهِۦ فَعُمِّيَتْ عَلَيْكُمْ أَنُلْزِمُكُمُوهَا وَأَنتُمْ لَهَا كَٰرِهُونَ
verses.text: He said, ‘My people! Do you see? If I (stand) on a clear sign from my Lord, and He has given me mercy from Himself, but it has been obscured for you, shall we compel you (to accept) it when you are unwilling?

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ أَرَءَيۡتُمۡ إِن كُنتُ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّي وَءَاتَىٰنِي رَحۡمَةٗ مِّنۡ عِندِهِۦ فَعَمِيَتۡ عَلَيۡكُمۡ أَنُلۡزِمُكُمُوهَا وَأَنتُمۡ لَهَا كَٰرِهُونَ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “O my people, have you seen? What if I rely on evident proof from my Lord, and He has given me a mercy of His own, but it became invisible to you —can we compel you to accept it even though you dislike it?

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ أَرَءَيۡتُمۡ إِن كُنتُ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّي وَءَاتَىٰنِي رَحۡمَةٗ مِّنۡ  عِندِهِۦ فَعَمِيَتۡ عَلَيۡكُمۡ أَنُلۡزِمُكُمُوهَا وَأَنتُمۡ لَهَا كَٰرِهُونَ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “O my people, have you seen? What if I rely on evident proof from my Lord, and He has given me a mercy of His own, but it became invisible to you —can we compel you to accept it even though you dislike it?

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ أَرَءَيۡتُمۡ إِن كُنتُ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّي وَءَاتَىٰنِي رَحۡمَةٗ مِّنۡ عِندِهِۦ فَعَمِيَتۡ عَلَيۡكُمۡ أَنُلۡزِمُكُمُوهَا وَأَنتُمۡ لَهَا كَٰرِهُونَ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “O my people, have you seen? What if I rely on evident proof from my Lord, and He has given me a mercy of His own, but it became invisible to you —can we compel you to accept it even though you dislike it?

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ أَرَءَيۡتُمۡ إِن كُنتُ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّي وَءَاتَىٰنِي رَحۡمَةٗ مِّنۡ عِندِهِۦ فَعُمِّيَتۡ عَلَيۡكُمۡ أَنُلۡزِمُكُمُوهَا وَأَنتُمۡ لَهَا كَٰرِهُونَ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “O my people, have you seen? What if I rely on evident proof from my Lord, and He has given me a mercy of His own, but it was made invisible to you —can we compel you to accept it even though you dislike it?

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ أَرَءَيۡتُمُۥ إِن كُنتُ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّي وَءَاتَىٰنِي رَحۡمَةٗ مِّنۡ عِندِهِۦ فَعَمِيَتۡ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ أَنُلۡزِمُكُمُوهَا وَأَنتُمُۥ لَهَا كَٰرِهُونَ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “O my people, have you seen? What if I rely on evident proof from my Lord, and He has given me a mercy of His own, but it became invisible to you —can we compel you to accept it even though you dislike it?

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ أَرَءَيۡتُمُۥ إِن كُنتُ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّي وَءَاتَىٰنِي رَحۡمَةٗ مِّنۡ عِندِهِۦ فَعَمِيَتۡ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ أَنُلۡزِمُكُمُوهَا وَأَنتُمُۥ لَهَا كَٰرِهُونَ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “O my people, have you seen? What if I rely on evident proof from my Lord, and He has given me a mercy of His own, but it became invisible to you —can we compel you to accept it even though you dislike it?

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ يَٰقَوْمِ أَرَٰ۬يْتُمْ إِن كُنتُ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّے وَءَاتَيٰنِے رَحْمَةٗ مِّنْ عِندِهِۦ فَعَمِيَتْ عَلَيْكُمْ أَنُلْزِمُكُمُوهَا وَأَنتُمْ لَهَا كَٰرِهُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “O my people, have you seen? What if I rely on evident proof from my Lord, and He has given me a mercy of His own, but it became invisible to you —can we compel you to accept it even though you dislike it?

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ يَٰقَوْمِ أَرَٰٓيْتُمُۥٓ إِن كُنتُ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّے وَءَات۪يٰنِے رَحْمَةٗ مِّنْ عِندِهِۦ فَعَمِيَتْ عَلَيْكُمُۥٓ أَنُلْزِمُكُمُوهَا وَأَنتُمْ لَهَا كَٰرِهُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “O my people, have you seen? What if I rely on evident proof from my Lord, and He has given me a mercy of His own, but it became invisible to you —can we compel you to accept it even though you dislike it?

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَٰقَوْمِ لَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مَالًا ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِطَارِدِ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ ۚ إِنَّهُم مُّلَٰقُوا۟ رَبِّهِمْ وَلَٰكِنِّىٓ أَرَىٰكُمْ قَوْمًۭا تَجْهَلُونَ
verses.text: My people! I do not ask you for any money for it. My reward (depends) only on God. I am not going to drive away those who believe. Surely they are going to meet their Lord, but I see that you are an ignorant people.

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَٰقَوْمِ مَن يَنصُرُنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهِ إِن طَرَدتُّهُمْ ۚ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: My people! Who would help me against God if I drove them away? Will you not take heed?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَيَٰقَوۡمِ مَن يَنصُرُنِي مِنَ اَ۬للَّهِ إِن طَرَدتُّهُمۡۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And O my people, who will support me against Allah if I expel them? Will you not constantly remember?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَيَٰقَوۡم مَّن يَنصُرُنِي مِنَ اَ۬للَّهِ إِن طَرَدتُّهُمۡۚ أَفَلَا  تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And O my people, who will support me against Allah if I expel them? Will you not constantly remember?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَيَٰقَوۡمِ مَن يَنصُرُنِي مِنَ ٱللَّهِ إِن طَرَدتُّهُمۡۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And O my people, who will support me against Allah if I expel them? Will you not constantly remember?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَيَٰقَوۡمِ مَن يَنصُرُنِي مِنَ ٱللَّهِ إِن طَرَدتُّهُمۡۚ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And O my people, who will support me against Allah if I expel them? Will you not remind yourselves?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَيَٰقَوۡمِ مَن يَنصُرُنِي مِنَ ٱللَّهِ إِن طَرَدتُّهُمُۥۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And O my people, who will support me against Allah if I expel them? Will you not constantly remember?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَيَٰقَوۡمِ مَن يَنصُرُنِي مِنَ ٱللَّهِ إِن طَرَدتُّهُمُۥۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And O my people, who will support me against Allah if I expel them? Will you not constantly remember?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَيَٰقَوْمِ مَنْ يَّنصُرُنِے مِنَ اَ۬للَّهِ إِن طَرَدتُّهُمْۖ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And O my people, who will support me against Allah if I expel them? Will you not constantly remember?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَيَٰقَوْمِ مَنْ يَّنصُرُنِے مِنَ اَ۬للَّهِ إِن طَرَدتُّهُمُۥٓۖ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And O my people, who will support me against Allah if I expel them? Will you not constantly remember?

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَآ أَقُولُ لَكُمْ عِندِى خَزَآئِنُ ٱللَّهِ وَلَآ أَعْلَمُ ٱلْغَيْبَ وَلَآ أَقُولُ إِنِّى مَلَكٌۭ وَلَآ أَقُولُ لِلَّذِينَ تَزْدَرِىٓ أَعْيُنُكُمْ لَن يُؤْتِيَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ خَيْرًا ۖ ٱللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا فِىٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ ۖ إِنِّىٓ إِذًۭا لَّمِنَ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: I do not say to you, “I possess the storehouses of God,” nor do I know the unseen. And I do not say, “I am an angel,” nor do I say to those your eyes look down on, “God will not give them any good.” God knows what is in them. Surely then I would indeed be one of the evildoers.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَٰنُوحُ قَدْ جَٰدَلْتَنَا فَأَكْثَرْتَ جِدَٰلَنَا فَأْتِنَا بِمَا تَعِدُنَآ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: They said, ‘Noah! You have disputed with us, and disputed (too) much with us. Bring us what you promise us, if you are one of the truthful.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ إِنَّمَا يَأْتِيكُم بِهِ ٱللَّهُ إِن شَآءَ وَمَآ أَنتُم بِمُعْجِزِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘Only God will bring it to you, if He (so) pleases, and you will not escape.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَا يَنفَعُكُمْ نُصْحِىٓ إِنْ أَرَدتُّ أَنْ أَنصَحَ لَكُمْ إِن كَانَ ٱللَّهُ يُرِيدُ أَن يُغْوِيَكُمْ ۚ هُوَ رَبُّكُمْ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
verses.text: My advice will not benefit you – (even) if I wish to advise you – if God wishes to make you err. He is your Lord, and to Him you will be returned.’

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ ٱفْتَرَىٰهُ ۖ قُلْ إِنِ ٱفْتَرَيْتُهُۥ فَعَلَىَّ إِجْرَامِى وَأَنَا۠ بَرِىٓءٌۭ مِّمَّا تُجْرِمُونَ
verses.text: Or do they say, ‘He has forged it’? Say: ‘If I have forged it, my sin is on me, but I am free of the sins you commit.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَأُوحِىَ إِلَىٰ نُوحٍ أَنَّهُۥ لَن يُؤْمِنَ مِن قَوْمِكَ إِلَّا مَن قَدْ ءَامَنَ فَلَا تَبْتَئِسْ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: And Noah was inspired: ‘None of your people will believe, except for the one who has (already) believed, so do not be distressed by what they have done.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱصْنَعِ ٱلْفُلْكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا وَوَحْيِنَا وَلَا تُخَٰطِبْنِى فِى ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓا۟ ۚ إِنَّهُم مُّغْرَقُونَ
verses.text: Build the ship under Our eyes and Our inspiration, and do not address Me concerning those who have done evil. Surely they are going to be drowned.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَصْنَعُ ٱلْفُلْكَ وَكُلَّمَا مَرَّ عَلَيْهِ مَلَأٌۭ مِّن قَوْمِهِۦ سَخِرُوا۟ مِنْهُ ۚ قَالَ إِن تَسْخَرُوا۟ مِنَّا فَإِنَّا نَسْخَرُ مِنكُمْ كَمَا تَسْخَرُونَ
verses.text: And he was building the ship, and whenever the assembly of his people passed by him, they ridiculed him. He said, ‘If you ridicule us, surely we shall ridicule you as you ridicule.

verses.quran_arabic: فَسَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ مَن يَأْتِيهِ عَذَابٌۭ يُخْزِيهِ وَيَحِلُّ عَلَيْهِ عَذَابٌۭ مُّقِيمٌ
verses.text: Soon you will know (on) whom punishment will come, disgracing him, and on whom a lasting punishment will descend.’

verses.quran_arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَ أَمْرُنَا وَفَارَ ٱلتَّنُّورُ قُلْنَا ٱحْمِلْ فِيهَا مِن كُلٍّۢ زَوْجَيْنِ ٱثْنَيْنِ وَأَهْلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلْقَوْلُ وَمَنْ ءَامَنَ ۚ وَمَآ ءَامَنَ مَعَهُۥٓ إِلَّا قَلِيلٌۭ
verses.text: – Until, when Our command came and the oven boiled, We said, ‘Load into it two of every kind, a pair, and your family – except for the one against whom the word has (already) gone forth – and whoever has believed.’ But only a few had believed with him.

canonical_variants.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآ أَمۡرُنَا وَفَارَ اَ۬لتَّنُّورُ قُلۡنَا اَ۪حۡمِلۡ فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجَيۡنِ اِ۪ثۡنَيۡنِ وَأَهۡلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيۡهِ اِ۬لۡقَوۡلُ وَمَنۡ ءَامَنَۚ وَمَآ ءَامَنَ مَعَهُۥٓ إِلَّا قَلِيلٞ
canonical_variants.english: Until, when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, “Carry in it, of each female and male kind, one couple, and your family—except those against whom the sentence has already been passed—and those who have attained faith.” But none attained faith with him except a few.

canonical_variants.arabic: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَا أَمۡرُنَا وَفَارَ اَ۬لتَّنُّورُ قُلۡنَا اَ۪حۡمِلۡ فِيهَا  مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجَيۡنِ اِ۪ثۡنَيۡنِ وَأَهۡلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيۡهِ اِ۬لۡقَوۡلُ  وَمَنۡ ءَامَنَۚ وَمَا ءَامَنَ مَعَهُۥ إِلَّا قَلِيلٞ
canonical_variants.english: Until, when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, “Carry in it, of each female and male kind, one couple, and your family—except those against whom the sentence has already been passed—and those who have attained faith.” But none attained faith with him except a few.

canonical_variants.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَ أَمۡرُنَا وَفَارَ ٱلتَّنُّورُ قُلۡنَا ٱحۡمِلۡ فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجَيۡنِ ٱثۡنَيۡنِ وَأَهۡلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيۡهِ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ وَمَنۡ ءَامَنَۚ وَمَآ ءَامَنَ مَعَهُۥٓ إِلَّا قَلِيلٞ
canonical_variants.english: Until, when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, “Carry in it, of each female and male kind, one couple, and your family—except those against whom the sentence has already been passed—and those who have attained faith.” But none attained faith with him except a few.

canonical_variants.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَ أَمۡرُنَا وَفَارَ ٱلتَّنُّورُ قُلۡنَا ٱحۡمِلۡ فِيهَا مِن كُلّٖ زَوۡجَيۡنِ ٱثۡنَيۡنِ وَأَهۡلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيۡهِ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ وَمَنۡ ءَامَنَۚ وَمَآ ءَامَنَ مَعَهُۥٓ إِلَّا قَلِيلٞ
canonical_variants.english: Until, when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, “Carry in it, of each kind, a male and female coupled, and your family—except those against whom the sentence has already been passed—and those who have attained faith.” But none attained faith with him except a few.

canonical_variants.arabic: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَا أَمۡرُنَا وَفَارَ ٱلتَّنُّورُ قُلۡنَا ٱحۡمِلۡ فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجَيۡنِ ٱثۡنَيۡنِ وَأَهۡلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيۡهِ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ وَمَنۡ ءَامَنَۚ وَمَا ءَامَنَ مَعَهُۥ إِلَّا قَلِيلٞ
canonical_variants.english: Until, when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, “Carry in it, of each female and male kind, one couple, and your family—except those against whom the sentence has already been passed—and those who have attained faith.” But none attained faith with him except a few.

canonical_variants.arabic: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءَ ا۬مۡرُنَا وَفَارَ ٱلتَّنُّورُ قُلۡنَا ٱحۡمِلۡ فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجَيۡنِ ٱثۡنَيۡنِ وَأَهۡلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيۡهِ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ وَمَنۡ ءَامَنَۚ وَمَا ءَامَنَ مَعَهُۥ إِلَّا قَلِيلٞ
canonical_variants.english: Until, when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, “Carry in it, of each female and male kind, one couple, and your family—except those against whom the sentence has already been passed—and those who have attained faith.” But none attained faith with him except a few.

canonical_variants.arabic: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَا أَمْرُنَا وَفَارَ اَ۬لتَّنُّورُ قُلْنَا اَ۪حْمِلْ فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجَيْنِ اِ۪ثْنَيْنِ وَأَهْلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيْهِ اِ۬لْقَوْلُ وَمَنْ ءَامَنَۖ وَمَا ءَامَنَ مَعَهُۥ إِلَّا قَلِيلٞۖ
canonical_variants.english: Until, when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, “Carry in it, of each female and male kind, one couple, and your family—except those against whom the sentence has already been passed—and those who have attained faith.” But none attained faith with him except a few.

canonical_variants.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَ امْرُنَا وَفَارَ اَ۬لتَّنُّورُ قُلْنَا اَ۪حْمِلْ فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجَيْنِ اِ۪ثْنَيْنِ وَأَهْلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيْهِ اِ۬لْقَوْلُ وَمَنَ اٰمَنَۖ وَمَآ ءَامَنَ مَعَهُۥٓ إِلَّا قَلِيلٞۖ
canonical_variants.english: Until, when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, “Carry in it, of each female and male kind, one couple, and your family—except those against whom the sentence has already been passed—and those who have attained faith.” But none attained faith with him except a few.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَقَالَ ٱرْكَبُوا۟ فِيهَا بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ مَجْر۪ىٰهَا وَمُرْسَىٰهَآ ۚ إِنَّ رَبِّى لَغَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ
verses.text: And he said, ‘Sail in it! In the name of God (is) its running and its anchoring. Surely my Lord is indeed forgiving, compassionate.’

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقَالَ اَ۪رۡكَبُواْ فِيهَا بِسۡمِ اِ۬للَّهِ مُجۡر۪ىٰهَا وَمُرۡسَىٰهَآۚ إِنَّ رَبِّي لَغَفُورٞ رَّحِيمٞ
canonical_variants.english: And he said, “Embark in it. In the name of Allah who causes it to sail and who causes it to anchor. My Lord is most surely Oft-Forgiving, Bestowing of mercy.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقَالَ اَ۪رۡكَبُواْ فِيهَا  بِسۡمِ اِ۬للَّهِ مُجۡر۪ىٰهَا وَمُرۡسَىٰهَاۚ إِنَّ رَبِّي لَغَفُورٞ رَّحِيمٞ
canonical_variants.english: And he said, “Embark in it. In the name of Allah who causes it to sail and who causes it to anchor. My Lord is most surely Oft-Forgiving, Bestowing of mercy.”

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَقَالَ اَ۪رْكَبُواْ فِيهَا بِسْمِ اِ۬للَّهِ مُجْرَيٰهَا وَمُرْسَيٰهَاۖ إِنَّ رَبِّے لَغَفُورٞ رَّحِيمٞۖ
canonical_variants.english: And he said, “Embark in it. In the name of Allah shall be its sailing and its anchorage. My Lord is most surely Oft-Forgiving, Bestowing of mercy.”

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَقَالَ اَ۪رْكَبُواْ فِيهَا بِسْمِ اِ۬للَّهِ مُجْر۪يٰهَا وَمُرْس۪يٰهَآۖ إِنَّ رَبِّے لَغَفُورٞ رَّحِيمٞۖ
canonical_variants.english: And he said, “Embark in it. In the name of Allah who causes it to sail and who causes it to anchor. My Lord is most surely Oft-Forgiving, Bestowing of mercy.”

verses.quran_arabic: وَهِىَ تَجْرِى بِهِمْ فِى مَوْجٍۢ كَٱلْجِبَالِ وَنَادَىٰ نُوحٌ ٱبْنَهُۥ وَكَانَ فِى مَعْزِلٍۢ يَٰبُنَىَّ ٱرْكَب مَّعَنَا وَلَا تَكُن مَّعَ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: It ran with them in (the midst of) wave(s) like mountains, and Noah called out to his son, since he was in a place apart, ‘My son! Sail with us and do not be with the disbelievers!’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ سَـَٔاوِىٓ إِلَىٰ جَبَلٍۢ يَعْصِمُنِى مِنَ ٱلْمَآءِ ۚ قَالَ لَا عَاصِمَ ٱلْيَوْمَ مِنْ أَمْرِ ٱللَّهِ إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ ۚ وَحَالَ بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلْمَوْجُ فَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُغْرَقِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘I shall take refuge on a mountain (that) will protect me from the water.’ He said, ‘(There is) no protector today from the command of God, except for the one on whom He has compassion.’ And the waves came between them, and he was among the drowned.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقِيلَ يَٰٓأَرْضُ ٱبْلَعِى مَآءَكِ وَيَٰسَمَآءُ أَقْلِعِى وَغِيضَ ٱلْمَآءُ وَقُضِىَ ٱلْأَمْرُ وَٱسْتَوَتْ عَلَى ٱلْجُودِىِّ ۖ وَقِيلَ بُعْدًۭا لِّلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: And it was said: ‘Earth! Swallow your water! And sky! Stop!’ And the waters subsided, and the command was accomplished, and it came to rest on al-Jūdī. And it was said: ‘Away with the people who were evildoers!’

verses.quran_arabic: وَنَادَىٰ نُوحٌۭ رَّبَّهُۥ فَقَالَ رَبِّ إِنَّ ٱبْنِى مِنْ أَهْلِى وَإِنَّ وَعْدَكَ ٱلْحَقُّ وَأَنتَ أَحْكَمُ ٱلْحَٰكِمِينَ
verses.text: And Noah called out to his Lord, and said, ‘My Lord, surely my son is one of my family, and surely Your promise is the truth, and You are the most just of judges.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ يَٰنُوحُ إِنَّهُۥ لَيْسَ مِنْ أَهْلِكَ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ عَمَلٌ غَيْرُ صَٰلِحٍۢ ۖ فَلَا تَسْـَٔلْنِ مَا لَيْسَ لَكَ بِهِۦ عِلْمٌ ۖ إِنِّىٓ أَعِظُكَ أَن تَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْجَٰهِلِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘Noah! Surely he is not one of your family. Surely it is an unrighteous deed. So do not ask Me about what you have no knowledge of. Surely I admonish you not to be one of the ignorant.’

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ يَٰنُوحُ إِنَّهُۥ لَيۡسَ مِنۡ أَهۡلِكَۖ إِنَّهُۥ عَمَلٌ غَيۡرُ صَٰلِحٖۖ فَلَا تَسۡـَٔلَنَّ مَا لَيۡسَ لَكَ بِهِۦ عِلۡمٌۖ إِنِّيَ أَعِظُكَ أَن تَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡجَٰهِلِينَ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “O Noah, he is not of your family; surely, it is an unrighteous deed, so never ask me about something you know nothing about; I surely admonish you lest you be one of the ignorant.”

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ يَٰنُوحُ إِنَّهُۥ لَيۡسَ مِنۡ أَهۡلِكَۖ إِنَّهُۥ عَمَلٌ غَيۡرُ صَٰلِحٖۖ فَلَا تَسۡـَٔلَنَّ مَا لَيۡسَ لَكَ بِهِۦ عِلۡمٌۖ إِنِّيَ أَعِظُكَ أَن تَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡجَٰهِلِينَ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “O Noah, he is not of your family; surely, it is an unrighteous deed, so never ask me about something you know nothing about; I surely admonish you lest you be one of the ignorant.”

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ يَٰنُوحُ إِنَّهُۥ لَيْسَ مِنْ أَهْلِكَۖ إِنَّهُۥ عَمَلٌ غَيْرُ صَٰلِحٖۖ فَلَا تَسْـَٔلَنِّ مَا لَيْسَ لَكَ بِهِۦ عِلْمٌۖ إِنِّيَ أَعِظُكَ أَن تَكُونَ مِنَ اَ۬لْجَٰهِلِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “O Noah, he is not of your family; surely, it is an unrighteous deed, so never ask me about something you know nothing about; I surely admonish you lest you be one of the ignorant.”

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ يَٰنُوحُ إِنَّهُۥ لَيْسَ مِنَ اَهْلِكَۖ إِنَّهُۥ عَمَلٌ غَيْرُ صَٰلِحٖۖ فَلَا تَسْـَٔلَنِّۦ مَا لَيْسَ لَكَ بِهِۦ عِلْمٌۖ اِنِّيَ أَعِظُكَ أَن تَكُونَ مِنَ اَ۬لْجَٰهِلِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “O Noah, he is not of your family; surely, it is an unrighteous deed, so never ask me about something you know nothing about; I surely admonish you lest you be one of the ignorant.”

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّىٓ أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أَسْـَٔلَكَ مَا لَيْسَ لِى بِهِۦ عِلْمٌۭ ۖ وَإِلَّا تَغْفِرْ لِى وَتَرْحَمْنِىٓ أَكُن مِّنَ ٱلْخَٰسِرِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘My Lord, surely I take refuge with You for asking You about what I have no knowledge of, and unless You forgive me and have compassion on me, I shall be one of the losers.’

verses.quran_arabic: قِيلَ يَٰنُوحُ ٱهْبِطْ بِسَلَٰمٍۢ مِّنَّا وَبَرَكَٰتٍ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰٓ أُمَمٍۢ مِّمَّن مَّعَكَ ۚ وَأُمَمٌۭ سَنُمَتِّعُهُمْ ثُمَّ يَمَسُّهُم مِّنَّا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: It was said, ‘Noah! Go down with peace from Us, and blessings on you and on the communities of those who are with you. But (to other) communities We shall give enjoyment (of life), (and) then a painful punishment from Us will touch them.’

verses.quran_arabic: تِلْكَ مِنْ أَنۢبَآءِ ٱلْغَيْبِ نُوحِيهَآ إِلَيْكَ ۖ مَا كُنتَ تَعْلَمُهَآ أَنتَ وَلَا قَوْمُكَ مِن قَبْلِ هَٰذَا ۖ فَٱصْبِرْ ۖ إِنَّ ٱلْعَٰقِبَةَ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ
verses.text: That is one of the stories of the unseen. We inspired you (with) it. You did not know it, (neither) you nor your people, before (this). So be patient. Surely the outcome (belongs) to the ones who guard (themselves).

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِلَىٰ عَادٍ أَخَاهُمْ هُودًۭا ۚ قَالَ يَٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلَٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ ۖ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا مُفْتَرُونَ
verses.text: And to ‘Ād (We sent) their brother Hūd. He said, ‘My people! Serve God! You have no god other than Him. You are nothing but forgers (of lies).

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰقَوْمِ لَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ أَجْرًا ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَى ٱلَّذِى فَطَرَنِىٓ ۚ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: My people! I do not ask you for any reward for it. My reward (depends) only on the One who created me. Will you not understand?’

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَٰقَوْمِ ٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ ثُمَّ تُوبُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِ يُرْسِلِ ٱلسَّمَآءَ عَلَيْكُم مِّدْرَارًۭا وَيَزِدْكُمْ قُوَّةً إِلَىٰ قُوَّتِكُمْ وَلَا تَتَوَلَّوْا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: And: ‘My people! Ask forgiveness from your Lord, (and) then turn to Him (in repentance). He will send the sky (down) on you in abundance (of rain), and increase you in strength upon your strength. Do not turn away as sinners.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَٰهُودُ مَا جِئْتَنَا بِبَيِّنَةٍۢ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِتَارِكِىٓ ءَالِهَتِنَا عَن قَوْلِكَ وَمَا نَحْنُ لَكَ بِمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: They said, ‘Hūd! You have not brought us any clear sign, and we are not going to abandon our gods on your saying, (for) we do not believe in you.

verses.quran_arabic: إِن نَّقُولُ إِلَّا ٱعْتَرَىٰكَ بَعْضُ ءَالِهَتِنَا بِسُوٓءٍۢ ۗ قَالَ إِنِّىٓ أُشْهِدُ ٱللَّهَ وَٱشْهَدُوٓا۟ أَنِّى بَرِىٓءٌۭ مِّمَّا تُشْرِكُونَ
verses.text: We (can) only say (that) one of our gods has seized you with evil.’ He said, ‘Surely I call God to witness, and you bear witness (too), that I am free of what you associate,

verses.quran_arabic: مِن دُونِهِۦ ۖ فَكِيدُونِى جَمِيعًۭا ثُمَّ لَا تُنظِرُونِ
verses.text: other than Him. So plot against me, all of you, (and) then do not spare me.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنِّى تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ رَبِّى وَرَبِّكُم ۚ مَّا مِن دَآبَّةٍ إِلَّا هُوَ ءَاخِذٌۢ بِنَاصِيَتِهَآ ۚ إِنَّ رَبِّى عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍۢ مُّسْتَقِيمٍۢ
verses.text: Surely I have put my trust in God, my Lord and your Lord. (There is) no creature He does not seize by its hair. Surely my Lord is on a straight path.

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِن تَوَلَّوْا۟ فَقَدْ أَبْلَغْتُكُم مَّآ أُرْسِلْتُ بِهِۦٓ إِلَيْكُمْ ۚ وَيَسْتَخْلِفُ رَبِّى قَوْمًا غَيْرَكُمْ وَلَا تَضُرُّونَهُۥ شَيْـًٔا ۚ إِنَّ رَبِّى عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ حَفِيظٌۭ
verses.text: If you turn away, I have delivered to you what I was sent to you with, and my Lord will make another people succeed you, and you will not harm Him at all. Surely my Lord is a watcher over everything.’

canonical_variants.arabic: فَإِن تَّوَلَّوۡاْ فَقَدۡ أَبۡلَغۡتُكُمُۥ مَا أُرۡسِلۡتُ بِهِۦ إِلَيۡكُمُۥۚ وَيَسۡتَخۡلِفُ رَبِّي قَوۡمًا غَيۡرَكُمُۥ وَلَا تَضُرُّونَهُۥ شَيۡـًٔاۚ إِنَّ رَبِّي عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ حَفِيظٞ
canonical_variants.english: But if youpl turn away, then I have conveyed to you what I was sent to you with. And my Lord will make other people succeed you, and you will not harm Him at all. My Lord is indeed a Constant Preserver over everything.

canonical_variants.arabic: فَإِن تَوَلَّوۡاْ فَقَدۡ أَبۡلَغۡتُكُمُۥ مَا أُرۡسِلۡتُ بِهِۦ إِلَيۡكُمُۥۚ وَيَسۡتَخۡلِفُ رَبِّي قَوۡمًا غَيۡرَكُمُۥ وَلَا تَضُرُّونَهُۥ شَيۡـًٔاۚ إِنَّ رَبِّي عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ حَفِيظٞ
canonical_variants.english: But if they turn away, then I have conveyed to you what I was sent to you with. And my Lord will make other people succeed you, and you will not harm Him at all. My Lord is indeed a Constant Preserver over everything.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَمَّا جَآءَ أَمْرُنَا نَجَّيْنَا هُودًۭا وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مَعَهُۥ بِرَحْمَةٍۢ مِّنَّا وَنَجَّيْنَٰهُم مِّنْ عَذَابٍ غَلِيظٍۢ
verses.text: And when Our command came, We rescued Hūd, and those who believed with him, by a mercy from Us, and We rescued them from a stern punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: وَتِلْكَ عَادٌۭ ۖ جَحَدُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَعَصَوْا۟ رُسُلَهُۥ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَ كُلِّ جَبَّارٍ عَنِيدٍۢ
verses.text: That was ‘Ād: they denied the signs of their Lord, and disobeyed His messengers, and followed the command of every stubborn tyrant.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأُتْبِعُوا۟ فِى هَٰذِهِ ٱلدُّنْيَا لَعْنَةًۭ وَيَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ ۗ أَلَآ إِنَّ عَادًۭا كَفَرُوا۟ رَبَّهُمْ ۗ أَلَا بُعْدًۭا لِّعَادٍۢ قَوْمِ هُودٍۢ
verses.text: And they were followed in this world (by) a curse, and on the Day of Resurrection: ‘Is it not a fact that ‘Ād disbelieved their Lord? Is it not, “Away with ‘Ād, the people of Hūd”?’

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَإِلَىٰ ثَمُودَ أَخَاهُمْ صَٰلِحًۭا ۚ قَالَ يَٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلَٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥ ۖ هُوَ أَنشَأَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱسْتَعْمَرَكُمْ فِيهَا فَٱسْتَغْفِرُوهُ ثُمَّ تُوبُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِ ۚ إِنَّ رَبِّى قَرِيبٌۭ مُّجِيبٌۭ
verses.text: And to Thamūd (We sent) their brother Ṣāliḥ. He said, ‘My people! Serve God! You have no god other than Him. He produced you from the earth and settled you in it. So ask forgiveness from Him, (and) then turn to Him (in repentance). Surely my Lord is near (and) responsive.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَٰصَٰلِحُ قَدْ كُنتَ فِينَا مَرْجُوًّۭا قَبْلَ هَٰذَآ ۖ أَتَنْهَىٰنَآ أَن نَّعْبُدَ مَا يَعْبُدُ ءَابَآؤُنَا وَإِنَّنَا لَفِى شَكٍّۢ مِّمَّا تَدْعُونَآ إِلَيْهِ مُرِيبٍۢ
verses.text: They said, ‘Ṣāliḥ! You were among us as someone in whom hope was placed before. Do you forbid us to serve what our fathers have served? Surely we are in grave doubt indeed about what you call us to.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ يَٰقَوْمِ أَرَءَيْتُمْ إِن كُنتُ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٍۢ مِّن رَّبِّى وَءَاتَىٰنِى مِنْهُ رَحْمَةًۭ فَمَن يَنصُرُنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهِ إِنْ عَصَيْتُهُۥ ۖ فَمَا تَزِيدُونَنِى غَيْرَ تَخْسِيرٍۢ
verses.text: He said, ‘My people! Do you see? If I (stand) on a clear sign from my Lord, and He has given me mercy from Himself, who would help me against God if I disobeyed Him? You would only increase my loss.

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَٰقَوْمِ هَٰذِهِۦ نَاقَةُ ٱللَّهِ لَكُمْ ءَايَةًۭ فَذَرُوهَا تَأْكُلْ فِىٓ أَرْضِ ٱللَّهِ وَلَا تَمَسُّوهَا بِسُوٓءٍۢ فَيَأْخُذَكُمْ عَذَابٌۭ قَرِيبٌۭ
verses.text: My people! This is the she-camel of God, a sign for you. Let her graze on God’s earth, and do not touch her with evil, or a punishment near (at hand) will seize you.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَعَقَرُوهَا فَقَالَ تَمَتَّعُوا۟ فِى دَارِكُمْ ثَلَٰثَةَ أَيَّامٍۢ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ وَعْدٌ غَيْرُ مَكْذُوبٍۢ
verses.text: But they wounded her, and he said, ‘Enjoy (yourselves) in your home(s) for three days – that is a promise not to be denied.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ أَمْرُنَا نَجَّيْنَا صَٰلِحًۭا وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مَعَهُۥ بِرَحْمَةٍۢ مِّنَّا وَمِنْ خِزْىِ يَوْمِئِذٍ ۗ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ ٱلْقَوِىُّ ٱلْعَزِيزُ
verses.text: And when Our command came, We rescued Ṣāliḥ, and those who believed with him, by a mercy from Us, and from the disgrace of that day. Surely your Lord – He is the Strong, the Mighty.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَخَذَ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ فَأَصْبَحُوا۟ فِى دِيَٰرِهِمْ جَٰثِمِينَ
verses.text: And the cry seized those who did evil, and morning found them leveled in their homes.

verses.quran_arabic: كَأَن لَّمْ يَغْنَوْا۟ فِيهَآ ۗ أَلَآ إِنَّ ثَمُودَا۟ كَفَرُوا۟ رَبَّهُمْ ۗ أَلَا بُعْدًۭا لِّثَمُودَ
verses.text: (It was) as if they had not lived in prosperity there. ‘Is it not a fact that Thamūd disbelieved their Lord? Is it not, “Away with Thamūd”?’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَتْ رُسُلُنَآ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ بِٱلْبُشْرَىٰ قَالُوا۟ سَلَٰمًۭا ۖ قَالَ سَلَٰمٌۭ ۖ فَمَا لَبِثَ أَن جَآءَ بِعِجْلٍ حَنِيذٍۢ
verses.text: Certainly Our messengers brought Abraham the good news. They said, ‘Peace!’ He said, ‘Peace!,’ and did not delay in bringing a roasted calf.

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّا رَءَآ أَيْدِيَهُمْ لَا تَصِلُ إِلَيْهِ نَكِرَهُمْ وَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ خِيفَةًۭ ۚ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمِ لُوطٍۢ
verses.text: When he saw their hands not reaching for it, he became suspicious of them and began to feel fear of them. They said, ‘Do not fear! Surely we have been sent to the people of Lot.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ قَآئِمَةٌۭ فَضَحِكَتْ فَبَشَّرْنَٰهَا بِإِسْحَٰقَ وَمِن وَرَآءِ إِسْحَٰقَ يَعْقُوبَ
verses.text: His wife was standing (there), and she laughed. And so We gave her the good news of Isaac, and after Isaac, Jacob.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَتْ يَٰوَيْلَتَىٰٓ ءَأَلِدُ وَأَنَا۠ عَجُوزٌۭ وَهَٰذَا بَعْلِى شَيْخًا ۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَشَىْءٌ عَجِيبٌۭ
verses.text: She said, ‘Woe is me! Shall I give birth when I am an old woman and my husband here is an old man? Surely this is an amazing thing indeed!’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ أَتَعْجَبِينَ مِنْ أَمْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ رَحْمَتُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَٰتُهُۥ عَلَيْكُمْ أَهْلَ ٱلْبَيْتِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ حَمِيدٌۭ مَّجِيدٌۭ
verses.text: They said, ‘Are you surprised by the command of God? The mercy of God and His blessings (be) upon you, People of the House! Surely He is indeed praiseworthy, glorious.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّا ذَهَبَ عَنْ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ ٱلرَّوْعُ وَجَآءَتْهُ ٱلْبُشْرَىٰ يُجَٰدِلُنَا فِى قَوْمِ لُوطٍ
verses.text: When the fright had left Abraham and the good news had come to him, he was disputing with Us concerning the people of Lot.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ لَحَلِيمٌ أَوَّٰهٌۭ مُّنِيبٌۭ
verses.text: Surely Abraham was indeed tolerant, kind, (and) turning (in repentance).

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰٓإِبْرَٰهِيمُ أَعْرِضْ عَنْ هَٰذَآ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ قَدْ جَآءَ أَمْرُ رَبِّكَ ۖ وَإِنَّهُمْ ءَاتِيهِمْ عَذَابٌ غَيْرُ مَرْدُودٍۢ
verses.text: ‘Abraham! Turn away from this! Surely it has come – the command of your Lord. Surely they – a punishment is coming upon them which cannot be turned back.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَمَّا جَآءَتْ رُسُلُنَا لُوطًۭا سِىٓءَ بِهِمْ وَضَاقَ بِهِمْ ذَرْعًۭا وَقَالَ هَٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَصِيبٌۭ
verses.text: And when Our messengers came to Lot, he became distressed about them, and felt powerless (to protect) them, and he said, ‘This is a hard day.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَجَآءَهُۥ قَوْمُهُۥ يُهْرَعُونَ إِلَيْهِ وَمِن قَبْلُ كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ ۚ قَالَ يَٰقَوْمِ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ بَنَاتِى هُنَّ أَطْهَرُ لَكُمْ ۖ فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَلَا تُخْزُونِ فِى ضَيْفِىٓ ۖ أَلَيْسَ مِنكُمْ رَجُلٌۭ رَّشِيدٌۭ
verses.text: His people came to him, rushing to him, (for) they had been in the habit of doing evil deeds before (this). He said, ‘My people! These are my daughters, they are purer for you. So guard (yourselves) against God, and do not disgrace me concerning my guests. Is (there) no one among you of right mind?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَقَدْ عَلِمْتَ مَا لَنَا فِى بَنَاتِكَ مِنْ حَقٍّۢ وَإِنَّكَ لَتَعْلَمُ مَا نُرِيدُ
verses.text: They said, ‘Certainly you know that we have no right to your daughters, and surely you know indeed what we want.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ لَوْ أَنَّ لِى بِكُمْ قُوَّةً أَوْ ءَاوِىٓ إِلَىٰ رُكْنٍۢ شَدِيدٍۢ
verses.text: He said, ‘If only I had the strength for you, or could take refuge in a strong supporter!’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَٰلُوطُ إِنَّا رُسُلُ رَبِّكَ لَن يَصِلُوٓا۟ إِلَيْكَ ۖ فَأَسْرِ بِأَهْلِكَ بِقِطْعٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ وَلَا يَلْتَفِتْ مِنكُمْ أَحَدٌ إِلَّا ٱمْرَأَتَكَ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ مُصِيبُهَا مَآ أَصَابَهُمْ ۚ إِنَّ مَوْعِدَهُمُ ٱلصُّبْحُ ۚ أَلَيْسَ ٱلصُّبْحُ بِقَرِيبٍۢ
verses.text: They said, ‘Lot! Surely we are messengers of your Lord. They will not reach you. So journey with your family in a part of the night, and let none of you turn around, except your wife, (for) surely what is about to smite them is going to smite her. Surely their appointment is the morning. Is the morning not near?’

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالُواْ يَٰلُوطُ إِنَّا رُسُلُ رَبِّكَ لَن يَصِلُوٓاْ إِلَيۡكَۖ فَأَسۡرِ بِأَهۡلِكَ بِقِطۡعٖ مِّنَ اَ۬لَّيۡلِ وَلَا يَلۡتَفِتۡ مِنكُمۡ أَحَدٌ إِلَّا اَ۪مۡرَأَتُكَۖ إِنَّهُۥ مُصِيبُهَا مَآ أَصَابَهُمۡۚ إِنَّ مَوۡعِدَهُمُ اُ۬لصُّبۡحُۚ أَلَيۡسَ اَ۬لصُّبۡحُ بِقَرِيبٖ
canonical_variants.english: They said, “O Lot, we are the messengers of your Lord; they will not reach you, so take your family on a journey while yet a part of the night remains. And let none of you look back except for your wife—she will be afflicted by that which afflicts them. Indeed, their appointed time is the morning. Is not the morning near?”

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالُواْ  يَٰلُوطُ إِنَّا رُسُل رَّبِّكَ لَن يَصِلُواْ إِلَيۡكَۖ فَأَسۡرِ بِأَهۡلِكَ بِقِطۡعٖ  مِّنَ اَ۬لَّيۡلِ وَلَا يَلۡتَفِتۡ مِنكُمۡ أَحَدٌ إِلَّا اَ۪مۡرَأَتُكَۖ إِنَّهُۥ مُصِيبُهَا  مَا أَصَابَهُمۡۚ إِنَّ مَوۡعِدَهُمُ اُ۬لصُّبۡحُۚ أَلَيۡسَ اَ۬لصُّبۡحُ بِقَرِيبٖ
canonical_variants.english: They said, “O Lot, we are the messengers of your Lord; they will not reach you, so take your family on a journey while yet a part of the night remains. And let none of you look back except for your wife—she will be afflicted by that which afflicts them. Indeed, their appointed time is the morning. Is not the morning near?”

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالُواْ يَٰلُوطُ إِنَّا رُسُلُ رَبِّكَ لَن يَصِلُواْ إِلَيۡكَۖ فَٱسۡرِ بِأَهۡلِكَ بِقِطۡعٖ مِّنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ وَلَا يَلۡتَفِتۡ مِنكُمُۥ أَحَدٌ إِلَّا ٱمۡرَأَتُكَۖ إِنَّهُۥ مُصِيبُهَا مَا أَصَابَهُمُۥۚ إِنَّ مَوۡعِدَهُمُ ٱلصُّبۡحُۚ أَلَيۡسَ ٱلصُّبۡحُ بِقَرِيبٖ
canonical_variants.english: They said, “O Lot, we are the messengers of your Lord; they will not reach you, so take your family on a journey while yet a part of the night remains. And let none of you look back except for your wife—she will be afflicted by that which afflicts them. Indeed, their appointed time is the morning. Is not the morning near?”

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالُواْ يَٰلُوطُ إِنَّا رُسُلُ رَبِّكَ لَن يَصِلُواْ إِلَيۡكَۖ فَٱسۡرِ بِأَهۡلِكَ بِقِطۡعٖ مِّنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ وَلَا يَلۡتَفِتۡ مِنكُمُۥ أَحَدٌ إِلَّا ٱمۡرَأَتُكَۖ إِنَّهُۥ مُصِيبُهَا مَا أَصَابَهُمُۥۚ إِنَّ مَوۡعِدَهُمُ ٱلصُّبۡحُۚ أَلَيۡسَ ٱلصُّبۡحُ بِقَرِيبٖ
canonical_variants.english: They said, “O Lot, we are the messengers of your Lord; they will not reach you, so take your family on a journey while yet a part of the night remains. And let none of you look back except for your wife—she will be afflicted by that which afflicts them. Indeed, their appointed time is the morning. Is not the morning near?”

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ أَمْرُنَا جَعَلْنَا عَٰلِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهَا حِجَارَةًۭ مِّن سِجِّيلٍۢ مَّنضُودٍۢ
verses.text: So when Our command came, We turned it upside down, and rained on it stones of baked clay, one after another,

verses.quran_arabic: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ ۖ وَمَا هِىَ مِنَ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ بِبَعِيدٍۢ
verses.text: marked in the presence of your Lord. It is not far from the evildoers.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَإِلَىٰ مَدْيَنَ أَخَاهُمْ شُعَيْبًۭا ۚ قَالَ يَٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلَٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥ ۖ وَلَا تَنقُصُوا۟ ٱلْمِكْيَالَ وَٱلْمِيزَانَ ۚ إِنِّىٓ أَرَىٰكُم بِخَيْرٍۢ وَإِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍۢ مُّحِيطٍۢ
verses.text: And to Midian (We sent) their brother Shu‘ayb. He said, ‘My people! Serve God! You have no god other than Him. Do not diminish the measure or the scale. Surely I see you in prosperity, but surely I fear for you the punishment of an overwhelming day.

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَٰقَوْمِ أَوْفُوا۟ ٱلْمِكْيَالَ وَٱلْمِيزَانَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ ۖ وَلَا تَبْخَسُوا۟ ٱلنَّاسَ أَشْيَآءَهُمْ وَلَا تَعْثَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ
verses.text: My people! Fill up the measure and the scale in justice, and do not shortchange the people of their wealth, and do not act wickedly on the earth, fomenting corruption.

verses.quran_arabic: بَقِيَّتُ ٱللَّهِ خَيْرٌۭ لَّكُمْ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ ۚ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ عَلَيْكُم بِحَفِيظٍۢ
verses.text: A remnant of God is better for you, if you are believers. I am not a watcher over you.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَٰشُعَيْبُ أَصَلَوٰتُكَ تَأْمُرُكَ أَن نَّتْرُكَ مَا يَعْبُدُ ءَابَآؤُنَآ أَوْ أَن نَّفْعَلَ فِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِنَا مَا نَشَٰٓؤُا۟ ۖ إِنَّكَ لَأَنتَ ٱلْحَلِيمُ ٱلرَّشِيدُ
verses.text: They said, ‘Shu‘ayb! Does your prayer command you that we should abandon what our fathers have served, or that (we should abandon) doing what we please with our wealth? Surely you – you indeed are the tolerant (and) right-minded one.’

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالُواْ يَٰشُعَيۡبُ أَصَلَوَٰتُكَ تَأۡمُرُكَ أَن نَّتۡرُكَ مَا يَعۡبُدُ ءَابَآؤُنَآ أَوۡ أَن نَّفۡعَلَ فِيٓ أَمۡوَٰلِنَا مَا نَشَٰٓؤُاْۖ اِ۪نَّكَ لَأَنتَ اَ۬لۡحَلِيمُ اُ۬لرَّشِيدُ
canonical_variants.english: They said, “O Shuaib, do your prayers command you that we abandon what our fathers worship or that we should not do with our wealth whatever we will? Very truly, you are the forbearing, prudent one!”

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالُواْ يَٰشُعَيۡبُ أَصَلَوَٰتُكَ تَامُرُكَ أَن نَّتۡرُكَ  مَا يَعۡبُدُ ءَابَآؤُنَا أَوۡ أَن نَّفۡعَلَ فِي أَمۡوَٰلِنَا مَا نَشَٰٓؤُاْۖ اِ۪نَّكَ  لَأَنتَ اَ۬لۡحَلِيمُ اُ۬لرَّشِيدُ
canonical_variants.english: They said, “O Shuaib, do your prayers command you that we abandon what our fathers worship or that we should not do with our wealth whatever we will? Very truly, you are the forbearing, prudent one!”

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالُواْ يَٰشُعَيۡبُ أَصَلَوَٰتُكَ تَأۡمُرُكَ أَن نَّتۡرُكَ مَا يَعۡبُدُ ءَابَآؤُنَآ أَوۡ أَن نَّفۡعَلَ فِيٓ أَمۡوَٰلِنَا مَا نَشَٰٓؤُاْۖ إِنَّكَ لَأَنتَ ٱلۡحَلِيمُ ٱلرَّشِيدُ

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالُواْ يَٰشُعَيۡبُ أَصَلَوَٰتُكَ تَأۡمُرُكَ أَن نَّتۡرُكَ مَا يَعۡبُدُ ءَابَآؤُنَا أَوۡ أَن نَّفۡعَلَ فِي أَمۡوَٰلِنَا مَا نَشَٰٓؤُاْۖ اِ۪نَّكَ لَأَنتَ ٱلۡحَلِيمُ ٱلرَّشِيدُ

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالُواْ يَٰشُعَيْبُ أَصَلَوَٰتُكَ تَأْمُرُكَ أَن نَّتْرُكَ مَا يَعْبُدُ ءَابَآؤُنَا أَوْ أَن نَّفْعَلَ فِے أَمْوَٰلِنَا مَا نَشَٰٓؤُاْۖ اِ۪نَّكَ لَأَنتَ اَ۬لْحَلِيمُ اُ۬لرَّشِيدُۖ
canonical_variants.english: They said, “O Shuaib, do your prayers command you that we abandon what our fathers worship or that we should not do with our wealth whatever we will? Very truly, you are the forbearing, prudent one!”

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالُواْ يَٰشُعَيْبُ أَصَلَوَٰتُكَ تَامُرُكَ أَن نَّتْرُكَ مَا يَعْبُدُ ءَابَآؤُنَآ أَوَ اَن نَّفْعَلَ فِےٓ أَمْوَٰلِنَا مَا نَشَٰٓؤُاْۖ اِ۪نَّكَ لَأَنتَ اَ۬لْحَلِيمُ اُ۬لرَّشِيدُۖ
canonical_variants.english: They said, “O Shuaib, do your prayers command you that we abandon what our fathers worship or that we should not do with our wealth whatever we will? Very truly, you are the forbearing, prudent one!”

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ يَٰقَوْمِ أَرَءَيْتُمْ إِن كُنتُ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٍۢ مِّن رَّبِّى وَرَزَقَنِى مِنْهُ رِزْقًا حَسَنًۭا ۚ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَنْ أُخَالِفَكُمْ إِلَىٰ مَآ أَنْهَىٰكُمْ عَنْهُ ۚ إِنْ أُرِيدُ إِلَّا ٱلْإِصْلَٰحَ مَا ٱسْتَطَعْتُ ۚ وَمَا تَوْفِيقِىٓ إِلَّا بِٱللَّهِ ۚ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَإِلَيْهِ أُنِيبُ
verses.text: He said, ‘My people! Have you considered? If I (stand) on a clear sign from my Lord, and He has provided me with good provision from Himself [. . .]. I do not wish to go behind your backs to (do) what I forbid you from. I only wish to set (things) right, as much as I am able, but my success is only with God. In Him I have put my trust, and to Him I turn (in repentance).

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَٰقَوْمِ لَا يَجْرِمَنَّكُمْ شِقَاقِىٓ أَن يُصِيبَكُم مِّثْلُ مَآ أَصَابَ قَوْمَ نُوحٍ أَوْ قَوْمَ هُودٍ أَوْ قَوْمَ صَٰلِحٍۢ ۚ وَمَا قَوْمُ لُوطٍۢ مِّنكُم بِبَعِيدٍۢ
verses.text: My people! Do not let my defiance (of you) provoke you to sin, or something will smite you similar to what smote the people of Noah, or the people of Hūd, or the people of Ṣāliḥ. And the people of Lot are not far from you.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ ثُمَّ تُوبُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِ ۚ إِنَّ رَبِّى رَحِيمٌۭ وَدُودٌۭ
verses.text: Ask forgiveness from your Lord, (and) then turn to Him (in repentance). Surely my Lord is compassionate, loving.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَٰشُعَيْبُ مَا نَفْقَهُ كَثِيرًۭا مِّمَّا تَقُولُ وَإِنَّا لَنَرَىٰكَ فِينَا ضَعِيفًۭا ۖ وَلَوْلَا رَهْطُكَ لَرَجَمْنَٰكَ ۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْنَا بِعَزِيزٍۢ
verses.text: They said, ‘Shu‘ayb! We do not understand much of what you say. Surely we indeed see you as weak among us. But (for) your gang (of followers) we would indeed have stoned you, (for) you are not mighty against us.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ يَٰقَوْمِ أَرَهْطِىٓ أَعَزُّ عَلَيْكُم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱتَّخَذْتُمُوهُ وَرَآءَكُمْ ظِهْرِيًّا ۖ إِنَّ رَبِّى بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ مُحِيطٌۭ
verses.text: He said, ‘My people! Is my gang (of followers) mightier against you than God? Have you taken Him (as something to cast) behind you? Surely my Lord encompasses what you do.

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَٰقَوْمِ ٱعْمَلُوا۟ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِكُمْ إِنِّى عَٰمِلٌۭ ۖ سَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ مَن يَأْتِيهِ عَذَابٌۭ يُخْزِيهِ وَمَنْ هُوَ كَٰذِبٌۭ ۖ وَٱرْتَقِبُوٓا۟ إِنِّى مَعَكُمْ رَقِيبٌۭ
verses.text: My people! Do as you are able. Surely I am going to do (what I can). Soon you will know the one (on) whom punishment will come, disgracing him, and the one who is a liar. (Just) watch! Surely I am watching with you.’

canonical_variants.arabic: وَيَٰقَوۡمِ ٱعۡمَلُواْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَٰتِكُمۡ إِنِّي عَٰمِلٞۖ سَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُونَ مَن يَأۡتِيهِ عَذَابٞ يُخۡزِيهِ وَمَنۡ هُوَ كَٰذِبٞۖ وَٱرۡتَقِبُوٓاْ إِنِّي مَعَكُمۡ رَقِيبٞ
canonical_variants.english: And O my people, act according to your positions; surely, I am also acting (according to mine); you will know to whom will come a punishment that disgraces him and who it is that is a liar. So wait and watch; surely I too am watching out with you.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَيَٰقَوۡمِ ٱعۡمَلُواْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِكُمۡ إِنِّي عَٰمِلٞۖ سَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُونَ مَن يَأۡتِيهِ عَذَابٞ يُخۡزِيهِ وَمَنۡ هُوَ كَٰذِبٞۖ وَٱرۡتَقِبُوٓاْ إِنِّي مَعَكُمۡ رَقِيبٞ
canonical_variants.english: And O my people, act according to your position; surely, I am also acting (according to mine); you will know to whom will come a punishment that disgraces him and who it is that is a liar. So wait and watch; surely I too am watching out with you.”

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَمَّا جَآءَ أَمْرُنَا نَجَّيْنَا شُعَيْبًۭا وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مَعَهُۥ بِرَحْمَةٍۢ مِّنَّا وَأَخَذَتِ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ فَأَصْبَحُوا۟ فِى دِيَٰرِهِمْ جَٰثِمِينَ
verses.text: And when Our command came, We rescued Shu‘ayb, and those who believed with him, by a mercy from Us. And the cry seized those who did evil, and morning found them leveled in their homes.

verses.quran_arabic: كَأَن لَّمْ يَغْنَوْا۟ فِيهَآ ۗ أَلَا بُعْدًۭا لِّمَدْيَنَ كَمَا بَعِدَتْ ثَمُودُ
verses.text: (It was) as if they had not lived there. ‘Is it not away with Midian, (just) as Thamūd was done away with?’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا وَسُلْطَٰنٍۢ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: Certainly We sent Moses with Our signs and clear authority

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَإِي۟هِۦ فَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَ فِرْعَوْنَ ۖ وَمَآ أَمْرُ فِرْعَوْنَ بِرَشِيدٍۢ
verses.text: to Pharaoh and his assembly, but they followed the command of Pharaoh, when the command of Pharaoh was not right-minded.

verses.quran_arabic: يَقْدُمُ قَوْمَهُۥ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ فَأَوْرَدَهُمُ ٱلنَّارَ ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْوِرْدُ ٱلْمَوْرُودُ
verses.text: He will precede his people on the Day of Resurrection, and lead them to the Fire. Evil is the place (to which they are) led!

verses.quran_arabic: وَأُتْبِعُوا۟ فِى هَٰذِهِۦ لَعْنَةًۭ وَيَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ ۚ بِئْسَ ٱلرِّفْدُ ٱلْمَرْفُودُ
verses.text: They were followed in this (world by) a curse, and on the Day of Resurrection – evil is the gift (they will be) given!

verses.quran_arabic: ذَٰلِكَ مِنْ أَنۢبَآءِ ٱلْقُرَىٰ نَقُصُّهُۥ عَلَيْكَ ۖ مِنْهَا قَآئِمٌۭ وَحَصِيدٌۭ
verses.text: That is from the stories of the towns (which) We recount to you. Some of them are (still) standing and some (are already) cut down.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا ظَلَمْنَٰهُمْ وَلَٰكِن ظَلَمُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ ۖ فَمَآ أَغْنَتْ عَنْهُمْ ءَالِهَتُهُمُ ٱلَّتِى يَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مِن شَىْءٍۢ لَّمَّا جَآءَ أَمْرُ رَبِّكَ ۖ وَمَا زَادُوهُمْ غَيْرَ تَتْبِيبٍۢ
verses.text: Yet We did not do them evil, but they did themselves evil. Their gods, on whom they called instead of God, were of no use to them at all, when the command of your Lord came, and they only added to their ruin.

verses.quran_arabic: وَكَذَٰلِكَ أَخْذُ رَبِّكَ إِذَآ أَخَذَ ٱلْقُرَىٰ وَهِىَ ظَٰلِمَةٌ ۚ إِنَّ أَخْذَهُۥٓ أَلِيمٌۭ شَدِيدٌ
verses.text: Such was the seizing of your Lord, when He seized the towns while they were doing evil. Surely His seizing was painful (and) harsh.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ لِّمَنْ خَافَ عَذَابَ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمٌۭ مَّجْمُوعٌۭ لَّهُ ٱلنَّاسُ وَذَٰلِكَ يَوْمٌۭ مَّشْهُودٌۭ
verses.text: Surely in that is a sign indeed for whoever fears the punishment of the Hereafter. That is a Day to which the people will be gathered, and that is a Day (that will be) witnessed.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا نُؤَخِّرُهُۥٓ إِلَّا لِأَجَلٍۢ مَّعْدُودٍۢ
verses.text: We postpone it only for a set time.

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ يَأْتِ لَا تَكَلَّمُ نَفْسٌ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِۦ ۚ فَمِنْهُمْ شَقِىٌّۭ وَسَعِيدٌۭ
verses.text: (When that) Day comes, no one will speak, except by His permission. Some of them will be miserable, and some happy.

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ شَقُوا۟ فَفِى ٱلنَّارِ لَهُمْ فِيهَا زَفِيرٌۭ وَشَهِيقٌ
verses.text: As for those who are miserable, (they will be) in the Fire, where (there will be) a moaning and panting for them,

verses.quran_arabic: خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا مَا دَامَتِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ رَبُّكَ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ فَعَّالٌۭ لِّمَا يُرِيدُ
verses.text: remaining there as long as the heavens and the earth endure, except as your Lord pleases. Surely your Lord accomplishes whatever He pleases.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ سُعِدُوا۟ فَفِى ٱلْجَنَّةِ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا مَا دَامَتِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ رَبُّكَ ۖ عَطَآءً غَيْرَ مَجْذُوذٍۢ
verses.text: But as for those who are happy, (they will be) in the Garden, there to remain as long as the heavens and earth endure, except as your Lord pleases – an unceasing gift.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَأَمَّا اَ۬لَّذِينَ سَعِدُواْ فَفِي اِ۬لۡجَنَّةِ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا مَا دَامَتِ اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتُ وَاَلۡأَرۡضُ إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ رَبُّكَۖ عَطَآءً غَيۡرَ مَجۡذُوذٖ
canonical_variants.english: And as for the ones who have become happy, they are in the Garden (of Paradise), abiding therein for as long as the heavens and the earth remain, except as your Lord has willed—an uninterrupted grant.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَأَمَّا اَ۬لَّذِينَ سَعِدُواْ فَفِي اِ۬لۡجَنَّةِ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا مَا دَامَتِ  اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتُ وَاَلۡأَرۡضُ إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ رَبُّكَۖ عَطَآءً غَيۡرَ مَجۡذُوذٖ
canonical_variants.english: And as for the ones who have become happy, they are in the Garden (of Paradise), abiding therein for as long as the heavens and the earth remain, except as your Lord has willed—an uninterrupted grant.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ سَعِدُواْ فَفِي ٱلۡجَنَّةِ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا مَا دَامَتِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ وَٱلۡأَرۡضُ إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ رَبُّكَۖ عَطَآءً غَيۡرَ مَجۡذُوذٖ
canonical_variants.english: And as for the ones who have become happy, they are in the Garden (of Paradise), abiding therein for as long as the heavens and the earth remain, except as your Lord has willed—an uninterrupted grant.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ سُعِدُواْ فَفِي ٱلۡجَنَّةِ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا مَا دَامَتِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ وَٱلۡأَرۡضُ إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ رَبُّكَۖ عَطَآءً غَيۡرَ مَجۡذُوذٖ
canonical_variants.english: And as for the ones who have been granted happiness, they are in the Garden (of Paradise), abiding therein for as long as the heavens and the earth remain, except as your Lord has willed—an uninterrupted grant.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ سَعِدُواْ فَفِي ٱلۡجَنَّةِ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا مَا دَامَتِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ وَٱلۡأَرۡضُ إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ رَبُّكَۖ عَطَآءً غَيۡرَ مَجۡذُوذٖ
canonical_variants.english: And as for the ones who have become happy, they are in the Garden (of Paradise), abiding therein for as long as the heavens and the earth remain, except as your Lord has willed—an uninterrupted grant.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ سَعِدُواْ فَفِي ٱلۡجَنَّةِ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا مَا دَامَتِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ وَٱلۡأَرۡضُ إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ رَبُّكَۖ عَطَآءً غَيۡرَ مَجۡذُوذٖ
canonical_variants.english: And as for the ones who have become happy, they are in the Garden (of Paradise), abiding therein for as long as the heavens and the earth remain, except as your Lord has willed—an uninterrupted grant.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَأَمَّا اَ۬لذِينَ سَعِدُواْ فَفِے اِ۬لْجَنَّةِ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا مَا دَامَتِ اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتُ وَالْأَرْضُ إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ رَبُّكَۖ عَطَآءً غَيْرَ مَجْذُوذٖۖ
canonical_variants.english: And as for the ones who have become happy, they are in the Garden (of Paradise), abiding therein for as long as the heavens and the earth remain, except as your Lord has willed—an uninterrupted grant.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَأَمَّا اَ۬لذِينَ سَعِدُواْ فَفِے اِ۬لْجَنَّةِ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا مَا دَامَتِ اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتُ وَالَارْضُ إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ رَبُّكَۖ عَطَآءً غَيْرَ مَجْذُوذٖۖ
canonical_variants.english: And as for the ones who have become happy, they are in the Garden (of Paradise), abiding therein for as long as the heavens and the earth remain, except as your Lord has willed—an uninterrupted grant.

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَا تَكُ فِى مِرْيَةٍۢ مِّمَّا يَعْبُدُ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ ۚ مَا يَعْبُدُونَ إِلَّا كَمَا يَعْبُدُ ءَابَآؤُهُم مِّن قَبْلُ ۚ وَإِنَّا لَمُوَفُّوهُمْ نَصِيبَهُمْ غَيْرَ مَنقُوصٍۢ
verses.text: Do not be in doubt about what these (people) serve: they only serve as their fathers served before (them). Surely We shall indeed pay them their portion in full, undiminished.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتَٰبَ فَٱخْتُلِفَ فِيهِ ۚ وَلَوْلَا كَلِمَةٌۭ سَبَقَتْ مِن رَّبِّكَ لَقُضِىَ بَيْنَهُمْ ۚ وَإِنَّهُمْ لَفِى شَكٍّۢ مِّنْهُ مُرِيبٍۢ
verses.text: Certainly We gave Moses the Book, and then differences arose about it. Were it not for a preceding word from your Lord, it would indeed have been decided between them. Surely they are in grave doubt indeed about it.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّ كُلًّۭا لَّمَّا لَيُوَفِّيَنَّهُمْ رَبُّكَ أَعْمَٰلَهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِمَا يَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٌۭ
verses.text: Surely each (of them) – when your Lord will indeed pay them in full for their deeds. Surely He is aware of what they do.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِن كُلّٗا لَّمَّا لَيُوَفِّيَنَّهُمۡ رَبُّكَ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞ
canonical_variants.english: Yet to every one of them, your Lord will certainly render in full (the reward) for their deeds; indeed, He is All-Aware of what they do.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِنَّ كُلّٗا لَّمَّا لَيُوَفِّيَنَّهُمۡ رَبُّكَ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞ
canonical_variants.english: Yet indeed, to every one of them your Lord will certainly render in full (the reward) for their deeds; indeed, He is All-Aware of what they do.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِن كُلّٗا لَّمَا لَيُوَفِّيَنَّهُمُۥ رَبُّكَ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمُۥۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞ
canonical_variants.english: Yet to every one of them, your Lord will certainly render in full (the reward) for their deeds; indeed, He is All-Aware of what they do.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِن كُلّٗا لَّمَا لَيُوَفِّيَنَّهُمُۥ رَبُّكَ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمُۥۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞ
canonical_variants.english: Yet to every one of them, your Lord will certainly render in full (the reward) for their deeds; indeed, He is All-Aware of what they do.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِن كُلّاٗ لَّمَا لَيُوَفِّيَنَّهُمْ رَبُّكَ أَعْمَٰلَهُمْۖ إِنَّهُۥ بِمَا يَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞۖ
canonical_variants.english: Yet to every one of them, your Lord will certainly render in full (the reward) for their deeds; indeed, He is All-Aware of what they do.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِن كُلّاٗ لَّمَا لَيُوَفِّيَنَّهُمْ رَبُّكَ أَعْمَٰلَهُمُۥٓۖ إِنَّهُۥ بِمَا يَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞۖ
canonical_variants.english: Yet to every one of them, your Lord will certainly render in full (the reward) for their deeds; indeed, He is All-Aware of what they do.

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱسْتَقِمْ كَمَآ أُمِرْتَ وَمَن تَابَ مَعَكَ وَلَا تَطْغَوْا۟ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌۭ
verses.text: So go straight, as you have been commanded, (you) and those who have turned (in repentance) with you. Do not transgress insolently, (for) surely He sees what you do.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَا تَرْكَنُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ فَتَمَسَّكُمُ ٱلنَّارُ وَمَا لَكُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مِنْ أَوْلِيَآءَ ثُمَّ لَا تُنصَرُونَ
verses.text: Do not incline toward those who do evil, or the Fire will touch you – you have no allies other than God – (and) then you will not be helped.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ طَرَفَىِ ٱلنَّهَارِ وَزُلَفًۭا مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱلْحَسَنَٰتِ يُذْهِبْنَ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ذِكْرَىٰ لِلذَّٰكِرِينَ
verses.text: And observe the prayer at the two ends of the day and at the approach of the night. Surely good (deeds) take away evil (ones). That is a reminder to the mindful.

competing_variants.variant_arabic: أَقِمِ الصَّلاَةَ طَرَفَىِ النَّهَارِ وَزُلَفًا مِنَ اللَّيْلِ إِنَّ الْحَسَنَاتِ يُذْهِبْنَ السَّيِّئَاتِ ذَلِكَ ذِكْرَى لِلذَّاكِرِينَ
competing_variants.variant_english: Observe prayer (omitting 'And') at the (two) ends of the day and in the first hours of the night. Surely, good deeds take away evil deeds. That is a reminder for the mindful
competing_variants.hadith_arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، وَأَبُو كَامِلٍ فُضَيْلُ بْنُ حُسَيْنٍ الْجَحْدَرِيُّ كِلاَهُمَا عَنْ يَزِيدَ، بْنِ زُرَيْعٍ - وَاللَّفْظُ لأَبِي كَامِلٍ - حَدَّثَنَا يَزِيدُ، حَدَّثَنَا التَّيْمِيُّ، عَنْ أَبِي عُثْمَانَ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، بْنِ مَسْعُودٍ أَنَّ رَجُلاً، أَصَابَ مِنِ امْرَأَةٍ قُبْلَةً فَأَتَى النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَذَكَرَ لَهُ ذَلِكَ - قَالَ - فَنَزَلَتْ ‏{‏ أَقِمِ الصَّلاَةَ طَرَفَىِ النَّهَارِ وَزُلَفًا مِنَ اللَّيْلِ إِنَّ الْحَسَنَاتِ يُذْهِبْنَ السَّيِّئَاتِ ذَلِكَ ذِكْرَى لِلذَّاكِرِينَ‏}‏ قَالَ فَقَالَ الرَّجُلُ أَلِيَ هَذِهِ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ قَالَ ‏ "‏ لِمَنْ عَمِلَ بِهَا مِنْ أُمَّتِي ‏"‏ ‏.‏
competing_variants.hadith_english: Abdullah b. Mas'ud reported that a person kissed a woman and he came to Allah's Apostle (ﷺ) and made a mention of that to him. It was (on this occasion) that this verse was revealed:" And observe prayer at the (two) ends of the day and in the first hours of the night. Surely, good deeds take away evil deeds. That is a reminder for the mindful" (xi. 115). That person said: Allah's Messenger, does it concern me only? He (the Holy Prophet) said: It concerns every one of my Unimah, who acts according to it

competing_variants.variant_arabic: أَقِمِ الصَّلَاةَ طَرَفَيِ النَّهَارِ وَزُلَفًا مِّنَ اللَّيْلِ إِنَّ الْحَسَنَاتِ يُذْهِبْنَ السَّيِّئَاتِ ذَٰلِكَ ذِكْرَىٰ لِلذَّاكِرِينَ
competing_variants.variant_english: Observe prayer at the two ends of the day and in the first hours of the night. Surely, good deeds take away evil deeds. That is a reminder for the mindful.
competing_variants.hadith_arabic: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ يَحْيَى، وَقُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، وَأَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ - وَاللَّفْظُ لِيَحْيَى - قَالَ يَحْيَى أَخْبَرَنَا وَقَالَ الآخَرَانِ، حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الأَحْوَصِ، عَنْ سِمَاكٍ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، عَنْ عَلْقَمَةَ، وَالأَسْوَدِ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، قَالَ جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِنِّي عَالَجْتُ امْرَأَةً فِي أَقْصَى الْمَدِينَةِ وَإِنِّي أَصَبْتُ مِنْهَا مَا دُونَ أَنْ أَمَسَّهَا فَأَنَا هَذَا فَاقْضِ فِيَّ مَا شِئْتَ ‏.‏ فَقَالَ لَهُ عُمَرُ لَقَدْ سَتَرَكَ اللَّهُ لَوْ سَتَرْتَ نَفْسَكَ - قَالَ - فَلَمْ يَرُدَّ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم شَيْئًا فَقَامَ الرَّجُلُ فَانْطَلَقَ فَأَتْبَعَهُ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم رَجُلاً دَعَاهُ وَتَلاَ عَلَيْهِ هَذِهِ الآيَةَ ‏{‏ أَقِمِ الصَّلاَةَ طَرَفَىِ النَّهَارِ وَزُلَفًا مِنَ اللَّيْلِ إِنَّ الْحَسَنَاتِ يُذْهِبْنَ السَّيِّئَاتِ ذَلِكَ ذِكْرَى لِلذَّاكِرِينَ‏}‏ فَقَالَ رَجُلٌ مِنَ الْقَوْمِ يَا نَبِيَّ اللَّهِ هَذَا لَهُ خَاصَّةً قَالَ ‏"‏ بَلْ لِلنَّاسِ كَافَّةً ‏"‏ ‏.‏
competing_variants.hadith_english: Abdullah reported that a person came to Allah's Apostle (ﷺ) and said:Allah's Messenger, I sported with a woman in the outskirts of Medina, and I have committed an offence short of fornication. Here I am (before you), kindly deliver verdict about me which you deem fit. Unar said: Allah concealed your fault. You had better conceal it yourself also. Allah's Apostle (ﷺ), however, gave no reply to him. The man stood up and went away and Allah's Apostle (ﷺ) sent a person after him to call him and be recited this verse:" And observe prayer at the ends of the day and in the first hours of the night. Surely, good deeds take away evil deeds. That is a reminder for the mindful" (xi. 115). A person amongst the people said: Allah's Apostle, does it concern this marn only? Thereupon he (the Holy Prophet) said: No, but the people at large

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱصْبِرْ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يُضِيعُ أَجْرَ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: And be patient. Surely God does not let the reward of the doers of good go to waste.

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَوْلَا كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ أُو۟لُوا۟ بَقِيَّةٍۢ يَنْهَوْنَ عَنِ ٱلْفَسَادِ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا قَلِيلًۭا مِّمَّنْ أَنجَيْنَا مِنْهُمْ ۗ وَٱتَّبَعَ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ مَآ أُتْرِفُوا۟ فِيهِ وَكَانُوا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: If only there had been a remnant of men, among the generations before you, to forbid the (fomenting of) corruption on the earth – aside from a few of those whom We rescued among them. But those who did evil pursued what luxury they were given to delight in, and became sinners.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا كَانَ رَبُّكَ لِيُهْلِكَ ٱلْقُرَىٰ بِظُلْمٍۢ وَأَهْلُهَا مُصْلِحُونَ
verses.text: Yet your Lord was not one to destroy the towns in an evil manner, while its people were setting (things) right.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَوْ شَآءَ رَبُّكَ لَجَعَلَ ٱلنَّاسَ أُمَّةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ ۖ وَلَا يَزَالُونَ مُخْتَلِفِينَ
verses.text: If your Lord had (so) pleased, He would indeed have made the people one community, but they will continue to differ,

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ رَبُّكَ ۚ وَلِذَٰلِكَ خَلَقَهُمْ ۗ وَتَمَّتْ كَلِمَةُ رَبِّكَ لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنَ ٱلْجِنَّةِ وَٱلنَّاسِ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: except for the one on whom your Lord has compassion, and for that (purpose) He created them. But the word of your Lord is fulfilled: ‘I shall indeed fill Gehenna with jinn and people – all (of them)!’

verses.quran_arabic: وَكُلًّۭا نَّقُصُّ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ أَنۢبَآءِ ٱلرُّسُلِ مَا نُثَبِّتُ بِهِۦ فُؤَادَكَ ۚ وَجَآءَكَ فِى هَٰذِهِ ٱلْحَقُّ وَمَوْعِظَةٌۭ وَذِكْرَىٰ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Everything We recount to you from the stories of the messengers (is) what We make firm your heart with, and by this means the truth has come to you, and an admonition, and a reminder to the believers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقُل لِّلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ ٱعْمَلُوا۟ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِكُمْ إِنَّا عَٰمِلُونَ
verses.text: Say to those who do not believe: ‘Do as you are able. Surely we are going to do (what we can).’

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقُل لِّلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ ٱعۡمَلُواْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَٰتِكُمۡ إِنَّا عَٰمِلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And say to those who do not believe, “Act according to your positions; surely, we are also acting (according to ours).

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقُل لِّلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ ٱعۡمَلُواْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِكُمۡ إِنَّا عَٰمِلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And say to those who do not believe, “Act according to your position; surely, we are also acting (according to ours).

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱنتَظِرُوٓا۟ إِنَّا مُنتَظِرُونَ
verses.text: And: ‘(Just) wait! Surely we (too) are waiting.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلِلَّهِ غَيْبُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِلَيْهِ يُرْجَعُ ٱلْأَمْرُ كُلُّهُۥ فَٱعْبُدْهُ وَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَيْهِ ۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: To God (belongs) the unseen in the heavens and the earth, and to Him the affair – all of it – will be returned. So serve Him and put your trust in Him! Your Lord is not oblivious of what you do.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلِلَّهِ غَيۡبُ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِ وَإِلَيۡهِ يَرۡجِعُ اُ۬لۡأَمۡرُ كُلُّهُۥ فَاَعۡبُدۡهُ وَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَيۡهِۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And to Allah belongs the hidden realm of the heavens and the earth, and to Him every matter returns. So worshipsg Him and place your trust in Him, for your Lord is not oblivious of what they do.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلِلَّهِ غَيۡبُ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِ وَإِلَيۡهِ يَرۡجِعُ اُ۬لۡأَمۡرُ كُلُّهُۥ  فَاَعۡبُدۡهُ وَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَيۡهِۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And to Allah belongs the hidden realm of the heavens and the earth, and to Him every matter returns. So worshipsg Him and place your trust in Him, for your Lord is not oblivious of what they do.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلِلَّهِ غَيۡبُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَإِلَيۡهِ يَرۡجِعُ ٱلۡأَمۡرُ كُلُّهُۥ فَٱعۡبُدۡهُ وَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَيۡهِۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And to Allah belongs the hidden realm of the heavens and the earth, and to Him every matter returns. So worshipsg Him and place your trust in Him, for your Lord is not oblivious of what they do.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلِلَّهِ غَيۡبُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَإِلَيۡهِ يُرۡجَعُ ٱلۡأَمۡرُ كُلُّهُۥ فَٱعۡبُدۡهُ وَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَيۡهِۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And to Allah belongs the hidden realm of the heavens and the earth, and to Him every matter is returned. So worshipsg Him and place your trust in Him, for your Lord is not oblivious of what youpl do.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلِلَّهِ غَيۡبُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَإِلَيۡهِۦ يَرۡجِعُ ٱلۡأَمۡرُ كُلُّهُۥ فَٱعۡبُدۡهُۥ وَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَيۡهِۦۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلِلَّهِ غَيۡبُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَإِلَيۡهِۦ يَرۡجِعُ ٱلۡأَمۡرُ كُلُّهُۥ فَٱعۡبُدۡهُۥ وَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَيۡهِۦۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ
